description:
Acerca del empleo
Job Description

Stefanini Group is looking for a UC and Conferencing System Engineer, to complement the technical capabilities of our Digital Workplace Platforms Tower within the Infrastructure Services Division.

The role is responsible for handling day-to-day technical operations like remote administration, configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting for various conferencing platforms and MS Teams devices within the environments of our customers.

Our new colleague will perform technical projects and support activities as well as business requirements analysis, design and solution implementation support, key to delivering services to customers according to specific agreements with them.

The ideal candidate will have experience in troubleshooting and diagnosing all aspects of videoconferencing system. Additionally, they will be comfortable and capable when working on customers' video conferencing platforms either when configuring new features or when diagnosing all manner of video, voice and communications faults and be able to work well under pressure as part of a team or individually.

Job responsibilities: 
Ensure continuous and efficient operation of systems in scope through troubleshooting, diagnosing, and resolving incidents along with handling of routine maintenance activities.
Ensure correct implementation, configuration, use and maintenance of in-scope technologies and environments related to Microsoft Teams and other Conferencing Devices.
Ensure focus on technical integration and consolidation activities to achieve better synergies within our delivery teams and with our customers' IT teams.
Act as an SME on assigned technologies for team members and customers.
Administer, configure, and monitor relevant devices and services through MS Teams Administration Center and other legacy platforms.
Remote Troubleshooting for videoconferencing and engagement with other 3rd level support or product groups for MS Teams Rooms and Polycom video conferencing devices (until they get migrated/replaced to MTR).
Remote MS Teams related assistance for Smart Glasses and Phones.
In collaboration with local field engineers, ensure videoconference room equipment (legacy and to-be) is operational and proactively check the correct and consistent setup of conference room equipment for the easy and reliable usage during meetings and conferences.
Monitor videoconferencing meeting rooms functionality via remote monitoring and initiate actions to address flags and alerts and monitor till room is back online and functional.
Drive and execute firmware upgrades or other software related activities as needed.
Initiate 3rd party vendors (current and to-be) actions related to installation/configuration/ replacement / repair / changes on the conferencing hardware, in collaboration with other Stefanini or customer teams (i.e., IT Asset Management, Local Field Support, etc.).
Collaborate with selected workplace technology supplier and customer product teams to receive hand over and training during site migration. This includes acquiring know-how for later support and setting up way to engage workplace technology supplier. 

 Key requirements: 
Full working proficiency with English.
Experience supporting large environments.
Working experience for Enterprise & Mid segment customer on Video platform.
Excellent hands-on experience administering, configuring, and troubleshooting Video Conferencing and Microsoft Teams devices (rooms, phones, etc.).
Experience with Cisco/Tandberg, Polycom, Lifesize or any other video conferencing systems.
Working knowledge of Microsoft 365/MS Collaboration suite and experience in managing Digital Workplace and Collaboration Technologies.
Technical troubleshooting and debugging experience.
Scripting experience leveraging PowerShell and/or other programming languages.
Knowledge of TCP/IP networking, switches, routers, firewalls, and protocols.
Knowledge of Voice communications.
Experience working with IT Service Management (ITSM) processes i.e., Incident Management, Request Management, Change Management, etc.
Experience working in ITSM platforms i.e., ServiceNOW, Microfocus, Remedy, etc.
Ability to work in an organized manner with excellent planning, organization, and time management skills, paying close attention to detail to ensure quality in work delivered.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Strong interpersonal skills, with a focus on teamwork and collaboration.
Continuous learner with a keen interest in advancing technical skills.
ITIL Foundations certification is a plus.
Technical Certifications are a plus. 

What's next:
It's best to apply today, because job postings can be taken down and we wouldn't want you to miss this opportunity. In case you need further information, just send us a message at recruitmentEMEA@stefanini.com and we'll be happy to assist!
The preceding job description had been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this classification. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties and responsibilities required of employees assigned to this job.

Diversity & Inclusion
Here at the Stefanini Group, we value plurality and equity, regardless of race, sexual orientation, disability, age, ancestry, religion, gender, and nationality. We understand and encourage the importance of being you!

About Us
We are the Stefanini group, a global tech consulting company of Brazilian origin that believes in the power of people to transform businesses through technology.
We are present in over 40 countries and operate with the purpose of co-creating solutions TOGETHER WITH OUR CLIENTS that accelerate results and improve the experience of people and organizations.
Here, we like to say that technology is not the end, but the means: what really matters are the people who drive it all.
Our mindset is AI First, meaning we invest in cutting-edge technology in everything we do, focusing on results for our clients.
We are a company, A GROUP, that breathes collaboration and offers a dynamic environment where you will learn by doing, grow alongside the team, and have space to contribute with ideas and projects.
More than just talking about digital transformation, we believe in real transformation that starts with people and impacts real businesses.
If you are looking for a place to develop, innovate, and be part of something bigger, the Stefanini Group is your place.
We want to inform you that there are currently scams targeting job seekers by falsely using our company's name, Stefanini. We sincerely apologize for any confusion or inconvenience this may have caused.
Please remember that legitimate job offers from Stefanini will always come through official channels, including direct communication with our trained recruiters. If you receive any unsolicited messages requesting payment or personal information, please disregard them.
If you suspect you've been targeted, please contact us immediately at RecruitmentEMEA@stefanini.com for verification.
Key Points to Remember:
Legitimate job offers only follow interviews conducted with our hiring managers or clients.
We will never ask for payment at any stage of the recruitment process. 
Stay vigilant and feel free to reach out for verification. Your safety and security are our top priorities. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Acerca del empleo
Introduction

At IBM Software, and within Apptio, we help organizations turn complex financial and operational data into clear, actionable insights that drive better business outcomes. Our products, including Targetprocess, empower enterprises to plan, manage, and optimize their technology investments with confidence in an increasingly AI-driven, cloud-native world.

We build software that sits at the heart of how modern businesses operate—connecting strategy, finance, and delivery in a unified, data-driven experience. With Targetprocess, we enable organizations to embrace Agile at scale, align teams around value delivery, and continuously adapt to change.

Working in Apptio means joining a global community of engineers, product thinkers, and innovators who are passionate about solving real customer problems. You’ll collaborate across technologies, industries, and geographies to design and deliver solutions that simplify complexity and accelerate transformation.

With IBM’s commitment to innovation and Apptio’s focus on FinOps and enterprise agility, you’ll have the opportunity to grow your skills, shape impactful products, and help customers make smarter decisions about how they plan and run technology.

Your Role And Responsibilities

As a key member of our dynamic team, you will play a vital role in crafting exceptional software experiences. Your responsibilities will encompass the design and implementation of innovative features, fine-tuning and sustaining existing code for optimal performance, and guaranteeing top-notch quality through rigorous testing and debugging. Collaboration is at the heart of what we do, and you’ll be working closely with fellow developers, designers, and product managers to ensure our software aligns seamlessly with user expectations.

Master's Degree

Software Development Expertise: Experience in delivering enterprise-level software preferably in JavaScript/TypeScript and/or C#

Software Engineering Foundations: Strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, enterprise systems, asynchronous architectures and object-oriented programming
Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: Demonstrated excellence in problem-solving, with the ability to tackle complex issues and find effective solutions
Collaborative Team Player: Ability to work seamlessly as part of a team, contributing to collective goals and fostering a collaborative work environment

Preferred Technical And Professional Experience

SAAS Development: Experience developing Software as a Service (SaaS) applications and understanding the impact of this architecture in a deployment environment
Containers: Familiarity with container technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes, Helm)

 Doświadczenie z ML pipelines, MLOps, feature stores

description:
Acerca del empleo
About Us

Eskimi is a full-stack creative and media tech platform designed for brands, agencies, and publishers seeking more than just impressions. It combines a programmatic DSP, in-house creative studio, advanced audience targeting tools, customizable Media Packages, and a Monetization Suite for publishers. The platform powers attention-optimized campaigns with rich media formats and premium local inventory. Teams in over 30 countries provide on-the-ground support, offering valuable insights into local languages, cultures, and performance drivers.

At Eskimi, how we do things is defined by our strong desire to grow, a high sense of ownership, innovation, drive, and collaboration among our teams. With the Eskimi team spread across more than 30 countries and five continents, our global presence creates a dynamic environment that fosters diversity and inclusion.

YOUR TEAM & YOUR MISSION

The Engineering Team at Eskimi tackles complex adtech challenges with a focus on delivering business value quickly. Engineers build both scalable infrastructure and high-throughput, low-latency systems, solving complex problems that demand deep system-level thinking beyond the reach of AI tools.

The culture is built on making decisive technical choices that drive business outcomes. The team moves fast from problem identification to solution deployment, prioritizing impact over perfection.

In this role, you'll join the bidders team - the engineers who own the core of our real-time bidding platform - while also using AI as a practical tool to ship faster, write better code, and take on work that would otherwise require a much larger team.

What You’ll Do

Build and ship features on our real-time bidding platform - at 200k+ QPS, performance and correctness are non-negotiable
Use AI tools hands-on to ship code faster — own what you build end-to-end, from the first prompt to production deployment
Contribute to rewriting and modernising parts of our legacy platform, using AI tooling to move faster without cutting corners
Work across the full stack when needed - this isn't a role where backend engineers stop at the API boundary
Help shaping how the team works with AI day-to-day — what goes into the workflow, what doesn't, and how we raise the bar over time

WHAT WILL HELP YOU DO IT

Engineering Foundation

4+ years of backend engineering experience in a compiled, statically-typed language - Java, Kotlin, Go, Rust, C#, or Scala (we use Scala; we'll help you make the switch if your fundamentals are solid)
Comfortable with distributed systems: consistency trade-offs, failure modes, async processing
Experience with relational databases and at least one in-memory or NoSQL system (Redis, Aerospike, Cassandra, etc.)
You've shipped things to production and kept them running - monitoring, alerting, on-call mindset
Working experience with Git, testing strategies, and CI/CD pipelines

AI & LLM Experience

You've built and deployed at least one LLM-powered feature in a real product - not just a demo or a hackathon project
You know how to design prompts for reliable, structured output - and what to do when the model doesn't cooperate
You've thought about eval strategy: how do you know if your AI feature is working, and how do you catch regressions?
You understand the cost/latency/quality trade-offs between models and know when not to use an LLM at all
Bonus: experience with RAG pipelines, tool-calling agents, or vector databases

What’s In It For You

Flexible work arrangements: Hybrid work models in cities with physical offices, and remote work options everywhere else. With our hybrid model, Eskimians enjoy Work Away Days—up to one month of fully remote work each year—and flexible schedules, typically beginning the day at 9 a.m. locally.
Professional development opportunities: Grow with programs like Leaders Assembly for managers, mentorship programs for growing talents, regular learning sessions, and access to external consultants. Our internship programs also serve as stepping stones for career starters, often leading to full-time roles within the team.
Recognition & rewards: Your efforts matter, so we reward contributions with bonus programs and Bonusly, our peer-to-peer recognition system that turns appreciation into points for gifts and vouchers.
Additional perks: Private health insurance (location-dependent), volunteer days, and team get-togethers both online and in-person to foster meaningful connections in Eskimi.
Take a day off to celebrate your birthday! Everyone deserves to unwind and enjoy their special day, so we provide an extra day off just for your birthday.

JOIN US!

Be a part of a fast-growing adtech company and work with products that change the landscape of digital advertising around the globe. Let's grow together! With us, not even the sky's the limit.

description:
Acerca del empleo
Who we are 

Join some of the most innovative thinkers in FinTech as we lead the evolution of financial technology. If you are an innovative, curious, collaborative person who embraces challenges and wants to grow, learn and pursue outcomes with our prestigious financial clients, say Hello to SimCorp!

At its foundation, SimCorp is guided by our values — caring, customer success-driven, collaborative, curious, and courageous. Our people-centered organization focuses on skills development, relationship building, and client success. We take pride in cultivating an environment where all team members can grow, feel heard, valued, and empowered.

Why this role is important to us

We are a team of Software Engineers developing and maintaining SimCorp One Standard solutions based on SimCorp Dimension Configuration. Our work supports key areas such as Trade Execution, Portfolio Management, Compliance, Performance, and Risk.

You will take ownership of selected configuration domains, collaborate closely with Product Management, Standard Guilds, the SimCorp One Value Stream, and Consulting, and help deliver scalable, standardized solutions for SimCorp clients globally.

Designing, Developing and Maintaining portfolio of Standard configuration in SimCorp One 
Translate business requirements into robust configuration solutions; troubleshoot and resolve complex issues 
Partner with Standard Guilds and stakeholders to refine requirements and drive feature adoption 
Collaborate with Product, Value Stream, and Consulting teams to deliver end-to-end outcomes for clients 
Contribute to continuous improvement through knowledge sharing, documentation, and team learning 
Joining up with colleagues to use collective knowledge sharing and efficient problem resolution 

 

What we value:  

Experience in the financial industry and understanding of core front-to-back investment workflows 
In-depth knowledge in at least two of the following domains: Trade Execution, Portfolio Management, Compliance, Performance and Risk. 
SimCorp Dimension knowledge and hands-on implementation/configuration experience 
Proficient problem solving skills 
Dedicated belief in standardization and best practice concepts 
Proficient collaboration skills and fluency in English (written and spoken) 
Knowledge of Agile principles and experience in being part of an Agile team is an advantage 
Personal qualities: motivated, collaborative, well-organized, eager to learn, consistent, with high-quality mindset and good presentation skills, commercial awareness and customer orientation 

 

Our Benefits

Flexible working hours and hybrid model - 2 days in the office, 3 days remote 
Modern office (next to Wilanowska metro station) with quiet zones and ergonomic workstations 
Base salary with annual bonus structure 
Holiday allowance upon a 2-week vacation 
Occasional remote work across Poland and international options available (up to 24 days domestic, 20 days international per year - subject to internal policy) 
Employer-paid Medicover Platinum healthcare package (employee-paid family upgrade available) 
Multisport card with 75% employer contribution 
Unum group life insurance (employee-paid upgrade available) 
Medicover travel insurance for private trips and global business travel insurance 
Possibility to join Deutsche Börse Group Share Plan (eligible after 1 year) 
Copyrights program for certain roles 
Possibility to develop your career in an international environment 
Professional training and courses provided by SimCorp 
Polish language classes for foreign employees; German and English classes based on business needs 
Integration events, volunteering initiatives and employee-led clubs 

Compensation ranges are being disclosed at the initial stage of candidate engagement.

Next steps 

Please send us your application in English via our career site as soon as possible, we process incoming applications continually. Please note that only applications sent through our system will be processed. At SimCorp, we recognize that bias can unintentionally occur in the recruitment process. To uphold fairness and equal opportunities for all applicants, we kindly ask you to exclude personal data such as photos, age, or any non-professional information from your application. Thank you for aiding us in our endeavor to mitigate biases in our recruitment process.

If you are interested in being a part of SimCorp but are not sure this role is suitable, submit your CV anyway. SimCorp is on a positive growth journey, and our Talent Acquisition Team is ready to assist you discover the right role for you. The approximate time to consider your CV is three weeks.

We are focused on continually improving our talent acquisition process and making everyone’s experience positive and valuable. Therefore, during the process we will ask you to provide your feedback, which is highly appreciated.

Acerca del empleo
Why N-able

At N-able, we’re not just helping businesses be secure —we’re redefining what it means to be cyber resilient. Our end-to-end platform blends AI-powered capabilities and flexible tech stacks, so customers can manage, secure, and recover with confidence. But the real power behind it all? Our people. We’re a global crew of N-ablites, who love solving complex problems, sharing knowledge, and delivering solutions that actually make a difference. If you're into meaningful work, fast growth, and a team that’s got your back, you’ll be surrounded by people who believe in what they do—and in you.

What You'll Do

 Build secure, scalable, distributed and fault-tolerant cloud-native applications.
 Investigate and resolve complex technical issues with simple and elegant solutions.
 Continuously identify areas of improvement for product support and development process.
 Support and help our internal stakeholders.
 Participate in code reviews and documentation.
 Work with our software architects to build the architectural vision for N-able’s web applications, with the scalability and security of the platforms in mind.
 Coach and develop other developers and be an advocate for coding best practices and standards across N-able.


What You'll Bring

 You have practical experience in frontend development.
 Experience in TypeScript or JavaScript.
 You are knowledgeable about Full Stack JavaScript.
 Deep knowledge of Angular.
 Experience building reusable components.
 You are passionate about code quality, continuous delivery, and performance.


Purple Perks

Medical for employees, partner and dependents - fully covered for employees! 
Generous PTO and observed holidays 
2 Paid VoluNteer Days per year 
Employee Stock Purchase Program 
PPK with company-contribution 
FuN-raising opportunities as part of our giving program 
N-ablite Learning – custom learning experience as part of our investment in you 
The Way We Work – our hybrid working model based on trust and flexibility

At N-able, our mission is to protect businesses against evolving cyberthreats with an end-to-end cyber resilience platform to manage, secure, and recover. title: Senior Frontend Software Engineer

description:
Acerca del empleo
Join a diverse team of approx. 2000 professionals across four continents, driving innovation and growth within intive’s technology hubs. Work alongside industry experts trusted by leading brands like Audi, BMW, Deichmann, Meta, NewsCorp, Tandem, Paramount, Vorwerk, and Warner Bros. Discovery to create pioneering, sustainable digital experiences.

At intive, agile thinking and deep industry expertise come together across Automotive & Mobility, Commerce, Financial Services, Healthcare & Life Sciences, and Technology, Media & Communication. Be part of a team that’s shaping the future of digital innovation.

What You Will Be Doing

Design and develop modern iOS applications using Swift with a strong focus on clean architecture and maintainable code.
Build scalable application architectures using MVVM and Coordinators patterns.
Create UI programmatically without the use of Storyboards or XIB files.
Implement adaptive layouts using AutoLayout to support multiple device sizes and orientations.
Profile and optimize applications for performance, responsiveness, and memory efficiency.
Write well-structured, maintainable, and testable code following SOLID design principles.
Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving engineering standards.
Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and backend engineers in cross-functional teams.
Take ownership of technical implementations and help define best practices and architecture decisions.
Mentor less experienced engineers and contribute to team growth.

You’re a Good Match If You Have

5 years of sold experience developing iOS applications using Swift.
Solid understanding of iOS architecture patterns, especially MVVM and Coordinators.
Experience building UI programmatically without Storyboards or XIBs.
Hands-on experience using AutoLayout for responsive layouts.
Experience profiling applications to identify performance and memory issues.
Strong understanding of SOLID design principles and clean architecture.
Experience building scalable mobile applications.
Strong collaboration and communication skills.
Ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
Proactive mindset with a continuous improvement approach.

You Get Extra Points For

Experience with iOS technologies (Objective‑C) or cross‑platform frameworks (React Native)
Experience with dependency management tools such as CocoaPods or Swift Package Manager
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automation (CircleCI, Fastlane)
Understanding of DevOps practices

Why Intive

We cultivate an environment where innovative ideas and excellence have room to thrive - even with a remote workforce. Our culture of learning rewards curiosity and gives our team members opportunities to learn, grow, and own the evolution of their career.

Remote Work, Flexibility & Balance – Hybrid work. You are welcome but not required at our offices. We have flexible benefits (pyszne.pl vouchers, mobile phone, data subscription by modem or cash benefit).
Performance management – regular partnership meetings between each employee and his manager. You can create a career path based on your goals. We provide training, mentoring, and support to help you along the way.
Training & Mentorship – Learning and Development is a big part of our company culture. You will have access to a training budget, language classes, internal courses, and training.
Chapters – you will join a community of intivers sharing the same professional profile. There is space for knowledge sharing with people with similar capabilities to yours and to access the latest technology trends.
Culture & Connection – We cultivate connections within teams, across functions, and up and down the org chart. We make sure everyone is noticed and feels connected to our mission and each other. We arrange bonding events for our employees and their children. We care, so we have strong CSR.
Benefits offer – available for you and your family members: Medicover + More Smile Package, Multisport, Group Insurance, Sport Subsidy.

description:
Acerca del empleo
VOKI Games — студия разработки мобильных игр, где мы превращаем нашу любовь к играм в невероятные виртуальные миры. Мы создали два мировых хита – Manor Matters и Mystery Matters, которые покорили сердца миллионов игроков по всему миру!

Если ты Playable Ads Developer и хочешь создавать яркие интерактивные мини-игры, которые увидят миллионы игроков по всему миру – присоединяйся к VOKI team! 

Мы просто созданы друг для друга, если ты: 
Обладаешь опытом в gamedev проектах 
Владеешь на высоком уровне JS + ES6 
Уверенно работаешь с PixiJS или Phaser, либо другими библиотеками для работы с Canvas 
Обладаешь опытом работы с Gulp или webpack (сборка playable) 
Используешь принципы программирования: DRY, KISS, SOLID 
Обладаешь хорошим уровнем создания анимаций и визуальных эффектов 
Интересуешься Playable Ads и мобильной рекламой в целом 
Будет преимуществом: 
Опыт работы с Playable Ads 
Опыт работы с физическими движками, такими как MatterJS, Cannon-ES или другими 
Понимаешь принципы игровой логики и различных игровых механик+ инструментарий 
Знание технических требований рекламных сетей (Facebook, Mintegral, Adwords, Unity и др.) 
Навыки оптимизации ресурсов (графика, звуки, модели и др.) 
Умение самостоятельно работать с маркетинговым брифом (ТЗ)
Что нужно будет делать: 
Качественная и своевременная разработка Playable Ads в рамках утвержденного пайплайна 
Написание и техническая поддержка кода playables 
Разработка и внедрение новых игровых механик, улучшение существующих 
Работа с анимацией, визуальными эффектами, персонажами и физическим движком 
Взаимодействие с технической инфраструктурой разработки 
Поиск и интеграция в работу инструментов ИИ по своему направлению, которые могут ускорить работу или улучшить качество 
Контроль сроков выполнения собственных задач, заблаговременное оповещение лидов о трудностях и препятствиях в работе 
Работа с полученным фидбэком, применение рекомендаций в дальнейшей работе 
Как мы будем тебя вдохновлять:  
Возможность творить из любой точки мира. 
Забота о физическом и ментальном здоровье. Медицинское страхование для тебя и твоих детей, бесплатные консультации корпоративного психолога и 15 sick-leave days в год со 100% оплатой. 
Корпоративные плюшки, развлечения и мероприятия. Компенсация обедов, подарки, тематические дни в офисах, неформальные встречи с коллегами, онлайн-вечеринки и многое другое. 
Возможности профессионального и карьерного роста. Приобщайся к интересным внутренним тренингам, учебным курсам и профильным конференциям. 
Крутая команда. Реализуй крутые идеи вместе с энергичной, креативной и талантливой командой!

description:
Acerca del empleo
Job Description

Ciklum is looking for a Senior Automation QA Engineer to join our team full-time in Poland.

We are a custom product engineering company that supports both multinational organizations and scaling startups to solve their most complex business challenges. With a global team of over 4,000 highly skilled developers, consultants, analysts and product owners, we engineer technology that redefines industries and shapes the way people live.

About The Role

As a Senior Automation QA Engineer, become a part of a cross-functional development team engineering experiences of tomorrow. Together, we will work on the project focused on building and scaling automated testing frameworks and infrastructure to ensure high product quality and reliable CI/CD integration.

Responsibilities

Architect test automation frameworks from scratch
Develop automated functional UI tests and API or service-level tests
Integrate automated scripts into the CI/CD process
Develop, maintain and expand automated testing infrastructure
Devise and document test frameworks, coding standards, preferred design patterns, and development methodologies
Ensure code quality through peer reviews and adherence to guidelines and standards
Define quality metrics and implement measurements to determine test effectiveness and overall product quality within the automation process
Prepare conclusions and reports regarding the quality of the product under test
Collaborate with QA team members to automate manual test processes
Manage, analyze and mitigate testing risks
Onboard new team members to the project
Provide technical guidance and advice for testing teams

Requirements

Strong experience with C#
Proven Automation QA experience
Experience with .NET Core
Experience with unit and integration testing
Experience with Git

What`s in it for you?

Strong community: Work alongside top professionals in a friendly, open-door environment
Growth focus: Take on large-scale projects with a global impact and expand your expertise
Tailored learning: Boost your skills with internal events (meetups, conferences, workshops), Udemy access, language courses, and company-paid certifications
Endless opportunities: Explore diverse domains through internal mobility, finding the best fit to gain hands-on experience with cutting-edge technologies
Flexibility: Enjoy flexibility – full remote working possibilities
Care: We’ve got you covered with company-paid medical insurance, mental health support, and financial & legal consultations

About Us

At Ciklum, we are always exploring innovations, empowering each other to achieve more, and engineering solutions that matter. With us, you’ll work with cutting-edge technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and be part of a One Team culture that values collaboration and progress.

With delivery centers in Wrocław and Gdańsk, our 300+ professionals in Poland drive forward-thinking solutions for global clients. Join a community where collaboration sparks innovation—and your impact reaches millions.

Want to learn more about us? Follow us on Instagram , Facebook , LinkedIn .

Explore, empower, engineer with Ciklum!

Interested already? We would love to get to know you! Submit your application. We can’t wait to see you at Ciklum.

Major Accountabilities:

Performs and documents analysis of electronic circuits.
Creates simulation models of components and circuits.
Prepares scripts to support modelling and simulation activities.
Supports programs and engineers in the field of modelling and simulation.
Participates in design reviews.
Solves technical problems with simulation means.
Continuous learning and self-development.
Follows Aptiv values and cares for confidential information, company’s property and company good image.

Requirements:

MSc in Electronics or similar or BSc in Electronics or similar.
Knowledge of electronics components and specific types of electronic circuits (analog and digital).
Skills related to electronic components modeling and electronic circuits simulation (eg. SPICE, VHDL, IBIS, S-parameter) and knowledge of simulators (eg. Maple, Mathcad, Xpedition AMS, LTSpice, HyperLynx, Ansys Electronics Desktop).
Ability to work independently with specific simulation type (eg. WCCA, Transients PI, SI, EM).
Min. 1 year of experience on position related to simulation of electronic circuits or similar.
Good level of technical English.
Impeccable ethical attitude and compliance with Aptiv values.

description:
Acerca del empleo
Stanowisko

Dołączysz do projektu realizowanego w branży retail, którego celem jest rozwój i utrzymanie zaawansowanych systemów serwerów kasowych obsługujących sprzedaż w dużej skali. Systemy te stanowią kluczowy element infrastruktury sprzedażowej, odpowiadając za stabilność, wydajność oraz bezpieczeństwo procesów transakcyjnych. Projekt obejmuje zarówno rozwój nowych funkcjonalności, jak i modernizację istniejących rozwiązań (w tym systemów legacy), z naciskiem na ich skalowalność oraz wysoką dostępność. Praca odbywa się w środowisku rozproszonym, w ścisłej współpracy z zespołem developerskim oraz interesariuszami biznesowymi. W codziennej pracy wykorzystywane są technologie takie jak C/C++, MS SQL oraz narzędzia ekosystemu Microsoft. Duży nacisk kładziony jest na jakość kodu, dobre praktyki inżynierskie oraz ciągłe doskonalenie architektury systemu.

Dodatkowe informacje

Praca zdalna: 100%

Oferowane wynagrodzenie

130-150 zł/h

Sprawdzisz się w tej roli, jeżeli:

 Minimum 5 lat komercyjnego doświadczenia w programowaniu w C++
 Bardzo dobra znajomość języków C oraz C++ (praktyczne zastosowanie w projektach produkcyjnych)
 Doświadczenie w pracy z systemami legacy oraz ich modernizacji
 Znajomość MFC (Microsoft Foundation Classes)
 Dobra znajomość relacyjnych baz danych (w szczególności MS SQL)
 Doświadczenie w pracy z systemami kontroli wersji (Git)
 Biegłość w korzystaniu z narzędzi developerskich (np. Visual Studio)
 Znajomość języka angielskiego umożliwiająca pracę z dokumentacją techniczną
 Znajomość wzorców projektowych i umiejętność ich praktycznego zastosowania
 Samodzielność w podejmowaniu decyzji technicznych
 Dobre umiejętności komunikacyjne i zespołowe

Mile widziane:

 Znajomość języka Java
 Doświadczenie z narzędziem List & Label
 Dobra znajomość programowania obiektowego i wzorców projektowych
 Doświadczenie w optymalizacji wydajności aplikacji
 Doświadczenie w pracy z systemami wysokiej dostępności lub dużego obciążenia

Zadania, które na Ciebie czekają:

 Projektowanie architektury oraz rozwój systemów serwerów kasowych (branża retail)
 Utrzymanie i optymalizacja istniejącego kodu, w tym systemów legacy
 Tworzenie i utrzymywanie wysokiej jakości dokumentacji technicznej
 Współpraca z zespołem developerskim oraz interesariuszami przy dostarczaniu skalowalnych i stabilnych rozwiązań
 Identyfikacja obszarów wymagających optymalizacji oraz proponowanie usprawnień technologicznych
 Dbanie o jakość kodu, standardy oraz stosowanie dobrych praktyk inżynierskich.

Nasz proces rekrutacji

Rozmowa z naszym Rekruterem -> Rozmowa z naszym Business Managerem -> Spotkanie z Klientem W uzasadnionych przypadkach po rozmowie z Rekruterem wprowadzamy dodatkowy etap weryfikacji technicznej Potrzebujesz więcej informacji? Skontaktuj się ze mną: [adela.misiak@astek.net]

Co oferujemy

Company Description

With over 25 years’ experience, plus the same enormous passion and ambition we had on day-one, we’re trailblazers in the pet e-commerce industry. We work together to continually adapt; embracing change and the challenges it brings so that we can keep doing better. Join us and discover a place where your potential meets your passion for pets. Job Description

The Senior AI Engineer is responsible for embedding AI capabilities across the software development lifecycle (SDLC) to improve engineering productivity, delivery quality, and automation in PETS area of zooplus. The role focuses on building intelligent developer workflows using Model Context Protocol (MCP), context engineering, LLM orchestration, and AI-driven tooling.

Key Responsibilities

Design and implement AI-driven SDLC accelerators such as code generation, review automation, smart testing, and documentation support.
Develop MCP-based extensions and context-aware tools to streamline developer workflows.
Apply context engineering to improve LLM reasoning, accuracy, and relevance across engineering use cases.
Build LLM-integrated CI/CD workflows for pull request analysis, test automation, and deployment support.
Collaborate with engineering, platform, and product teams to identify and scale AI adoption opportunities.

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

Tech-agnostic mindset with strong programming experience in one or more of the following languages: Java, Python, JavaScript, or Kotlin, or broad working knowledge across multiple of these languages.
Hands-on experience integrating LLMs into engineering or product workflows.
Good understanding of RAG, embeddings, and vector databases.
Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform.
Experience with intelligent test automation and CI/CD pipelines.

Core Competencies

MCP Engineering – building modular, context-aware AI tooling
Context Engineering – structuring inputs for reliable AI reasoning
AI-Augmented Architecture – integrating AI into engineering systems
Product Thinking – identifying high-value GenAI use cases

Additional Information

Headquartered in Munich, with offices across Madrid, Krakow, Wroclaw, London and Vienna, we collaborate because we genuinely love working together - so you’ll be at the heart of an incredible, multinational team. We trust each other to get the job done, which means you’ll benefit from hybrid working, spending 60% of your time in the office and 40% at home. There’s an option to work for 20 days abroad in approved countries too.

Add to that development opportunities that help you to shape your own career path, excellent training and support, wellbeing offers, subsidised transport or bike leasing, plus 20% discount across all our products, and you’ll begin to get a sense of what sets us apart.
